profile: Supreme Gaia — Otherworld Guard tank built entirely around [Earth Energy]: 100% of damage she deals becomes Earth Energy, which grants Final DMG + Final DMG RED and is consumed on lethal hits to heal herself/allies, converting overheal to [Spirit Armor]. Her skills scale off the target's max HP and her own ATK/DEF, she deals True DMG (Genesis), and her Ultimate is AOE. She wants HP, Final DMG / Final DMG RED, True DMG, AOE damage, shields and survivability. She does NOT crit, does NOT basic-attack, and applies no bleed/infect.

ranking.name: Gaia Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: Her own themed mirror: HP% + on-lethal AOE True DMG (5%->11% of max HP to all enemies) perfectly matches her tank/HP/AOE/true-dmg kit. B-ish at 0-2*, S at 3* where it jumps to 11% and adds the +5% ATK&DEF stack.

ranking.name: Jeanne
ranking.reason: Final DMG RED + Healing boost is exactly the durability lever her Earth-Energy sustain wants; the Damage-Share clause is gravy and the base DR/heal alone is core for a tank.

ranking.name: Frostglow
ranking.reason: Flat Final DMG RED +12% — the single biggest pure survivability stat for a tank that must eat lethal hits to fuel Earth Energy. Top-tier from 0*.

ranking.name: Titan Strength
ranking.reason: She converts overheal to [Spirit Armor], so she reliably carries a shield: +ATK&DEF while shielded (15% at 3*) plus turn-end self-heal. Strong synergy with her Spirit Armor role. A->S at 3*.

ranking.name: Firmament
ranking.reason: Flat Final DMG +12% directly amplifies her max-HP% magic hits and AOE Ultimate; Final DMG is one of her two native scaling levers. Best from 0*.

ranking.name: Eternal Stand
ranking.reason: Final DMG RED that ramps as she's attacked (up to +15%) — ideal for a tank designed to soak hits; pure defensive synergy.

ranking.name: Albert
ranking.reason: HP +15% at max — her skills deal % of target max HP but her sustain/Spirit-Armor and survivability scale off her own HP pool; large flat HP is excellent for her.

ranking.name: Wukong
ranking.reason: All attacks add 5% ATK as True DMG — she's a native True-DMG dealer (Genesis) and AOE caster, so this stacks across every target she hits. Clean unconditional synergy.

ranking.name: Horde-Assault
ranking.reason: Her Ultimate is AOE (hits all enemies): adds 100% ATK True DMG split across targets. True-dmg + AOE both match her kit; reliable on every Ultimate.

ranking.name: Dark Tide
ranking.reason: HP +5% and +6% DMG while her HP exceeds the enemy's — as a high-HP tank with strong self-heal she stays above enemies, so both halves usually live.

ranking.name: Dracula
ranking.reason: HP +5% plus Healing Received that grows as HP drops — directly amplifies the Earth-Energy lethal-heal that keeps her (and the team) alive.

ranking.name: Garvin
ranking.reason: Final DMG RED +15% at max — same prime tank stat as Frostglow, just a smaller legendary version; strong filler whenever the anima isn't owned.

ranking.name: Rock Elephant
ranking.reason: Caps a huge hit by reducing excess over 50% max HP by 30% — helps her survive the burst spikes she intentionally tanks to trigger Earth Energy heals.

ranking.name: Luna
ranking.reason: Area-attack DMG +10% boosts her AOE Ultimate, but does nothing for her single/double-target Feat; partial damage synergy only.

ranking.name: Nyx Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: AOE + current-HP% True DMG fits her damage profile, but it's gated to PASSIVELY-triggered AOE skills, which she doesn't reliably have; conditional.

ranking.name: Ananke Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: Final DMG +5% base is useful, but the +15% rider needs the enemy in Damage-Share/Transfer, which Gaia doesn't apply herself; base-only value.

ranking.name: Nuwa Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: Final DMG +5% base helps; the bonus needs HER to be in Damage-Share state, situational on Gaia. Decent stat stick.

ranking.name: Warding Blessing
ranking.reason: On-death team Spirit Shields fit her tanky support role, but she's Lethal Immune and rarely dies, so the trigger is unreliable. B at 3*.

ranking.name: Mystic Bull
ranking.reason: Battle-start team shield scaling off her large Max HP gives real team value and synergizes with her own shield theme; modest but useful.

ranking.name: Isabella
ranking.reason: Final DMG +4% base is fine for her; the +6% needs enemies to carry [Shield], which is matchup-dependent. Half-synergy.

ranking.name: Jacob
ranking.reason: Final DMG + Final DMG RED scaling with HP lost touches both her levers, but she self-heals back up so she rarely stays low; partial uptime.

ranking.name: Tinplate
ranking.reason: On-hit reflect True DMG scaling off DEF — a tank that gets attacked a lot triggers it often, and True DMG fits; modest chip value.

ranking.name: Galos
ranking.reason: Flat DEF% — her Genesis V adds ATK/DEF and her hits use ATK, so DEF is a fine survivability stat, but small (epic-tier).

ranking.name: Frankenstein
ranking.reason: Flat HP% — same kind of stat as Albert but a low epic value; useful filler for a tank, just small.

ranking.name: Zhiming
ranking.reason: Flat Final DMG RED% — correct tank stat but only an epic-tier 5% max; outclassed by Frostglow/Garvin.

ranking.name: Yin
ranking.reason: Flat Final DMG% — matches a native lever but only +5% at max (epic); strictly weaker than Firmament.

ranking.name: Royal Awe
ranking.reason: Repeat-hit-same-enemy ramp — her Feat hits two distinct targets and Ultimate is AOE, so she seldom stacks it; weak fit.

ranking.name: Throat-Slitting
ranking.reason: Front-loaded Final DMG that decays per attack and resets on kill — she's a slow grindy tank, not a fast killer, so it bleeds off before paying out.

ranking.name: Wasteward
ranking.reason: Final DMG ramp on attack/Basic Attack — the Final DMG part helps a little, but it's tuned around Basic Attacks she rarely uses; mostly the half it can use is small.

ranking.name: Baleful Omen
ranking.reason: Final DMG +5% base is okay, but the [Lethal] anti-revive rider is offensive utility unrelated to her tank win-condition; base-only.

ranking.name: Night Depths
ranking.reason: True DMG that grows with HP lost — True DMG fits, but she heals back to high HP so few [Time Seal] stacks build; mostly idle on her.

ranking.name: Ling
ranking.reason: Bonus True DMG but only vs [Infect]'d targets — Gaia applies no Infect, so it depends entirely on a teammate; unreliable.

ranking.name: Lucifer
ranking.reason: Strong True DMG vs DoT targets, but Gaia applies no DoT herself, so the trigger leans on allies; conditional even at the 3* breakpoint.

ranking.name: Michael
ranking.reason: Final DMG per self-Buff — she gains ATK/DEF and Spirit Armor but not a wide buff count, so it stays near the low end; mediocre.

ranking.name: Ada
ranking.reason: ATK DMG vs debuffed enemies — she applies no debuffs, so it relies on the team and only buffs normal ATK damage, not her HP/true-dmg core.

ranking.name: Arthur
ranking.reason: ATK DMG vs controlled enemies — Gaia has no control in her kit, so the condition is teammate-dependent and off her win-condition.

ranking.name: Mister
ranking.reason: Flat ATK% — her hits use ATK but she's a tank, not an ATK-scaler; tiny epic value, marginal.

ranking.name: Aurora
ranking.reason: DEF Ignore boosts physical/magic but she already deals True DMG and max-HP% damage that bypass DEF; small overlap, low payoff.

ranking.name: Orpheus
ranking.reason: Turn-start self-heal is mild sustain that overlaps her far stronger Earth-Energy healing; off-role support filler.

ranking.name: Flame Dawn
ranking.reason: Revive on first death — she's Lethal Immune and self-resurrects via Earth Energy, so a one-time small revive is largely redundant.

ranking.name: Uncle Ying
ranking.reason: Ultimate DMG +20% — her Ultimate is AOE so there's some value, but her damage is HP%/True-DMG based, not pure Ultimate-scaling; modest.

ranking.name: Van Helsing
ranking.reason: Ultimate DMG boost that builds via Basic Attacks she never uses — the start-of-battle chunk helps her AOE Ultimate slightly, but the 3* ramp is dead on her.

ranking.name: Kira
ranking.reason: Single-target ATK DMG — she's an AOE/double-target HP%-scaler, so a single-target damage boost barely applies.

ranking.name: Valendine
ranking.reason: Single-attack DMG vs low-HP targets — wrong delivery (AOE, not execute) and she lacks a true single-target nuke.

ranking.name: Raphael
ranking.reason: Effect Resist Rate — minor survivability utility but she's already Lethal Immune with strong sustain; off her core.

ranking.name: Alluring Gaze
ranking.reason: Effect Resist Rate buff that's removed when she takes an action — she acts every turn, so the bonus chunk almost never persists; near-dead.

ranking.name: Elbera‘s Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: Effect Resist scaling off her buffs expiring — niche anti-CC stat with no tie to her HP/Final-DMG/True-DMG kit.

ranking.name: Lincoln
ranking.reason: Crit DMG RED defends against crits but is a narrow epic stat; minor for a tank with much larger DR options available.

ranking.name: Theresa
ranking.reason: Increases Heal output — she heals via Earth Energy, but this support stat is small and off her primary tank/durability axes.

ranking.name: Heidi
ranking.reason: Single-target heal-skill boost — Gaia's healing is conditional Earth-Energy on lethal hits, not a single heal skill; little overlap.

ranking.name: Elegy
ranking.reason: Entirely crit-gated (Healing-Received cut on Crit) — Gaia has zero crit in her kit, so it never triggers.

ranking.name: Alucard
ranking.reason: Pure Crit Rate/Crit DMG + on-Crit dispel — Gaia does not crit, so both base and the 3* clause are dead.

ranking.name: Vivi
ranking.reason: Flat Crit Rate — wasted: Gaia has no crit scaling anywhere in her kit.

ranking.name: Aelia
ranking.reason: Flat Crit DMG — useless on a non-crit hero like Gaia.

ranking.name: Daisy
ranking.reason: Final DMG base is okay but the payload is Crit Rate/Crit DMG [Hunt] stacks — almost entirely dead on a non-crit tank.

ranking.name: Hinata Inori
ranking.reason: On-ally-death Crit/Final-DMG burst — crit-centric and reactive; Gaia keeps allies ALIVE, so it fires rarely and the crit half is wasted.

ranking.name: Mars Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: Both base and 3* require a Feat Skill CRIT to trigger the True DMG/Spirit-Armor — Gaia can't crit, so it never activates despite the matching tags.

ranking.name: Adele
ranking.reason: Basic Attack DMG (crit/basic-atk) — Gaia is a skill/Ultimate caster who doesn't Basic Attack; dead.

ranking.name: Renais
ranking.reason: Basic-Attack-DMG stacker with on-kill re-Basic-Attack — Gaia never Basic Attacks, so even the famous 3* clause does nothing.

ranking.name: Scale-Splitting
ranking.reason: All value is on Basic Attacks (+ crit rider) — Gaia uses neither Basic Attacks nor crit, so the True DMG never fires.

ranking.name: Rose
ranking.reason: Final DMG ramp is fine in theory, but it's a basic-atk/ultimate stacker DPS mirror; on a tank it's outclassed and the basic-atk path is dead. Off-role.

ranking.name: Sherry
ranking.reason: Adds extra [Bleed] stacks on applying Bleed — Gaia applies no Bleed; completely inert.

ranking.name: Ying Gou
ranking.reason: Extra [Infect] on applying Infect — Gaia applies no Infect; never triggers.

ranking.name: Lilith
ranking.reason: Single-skill True DMG scaling with debuffs/Infect — single-target gated and needs debuffs Gaia doesn't apply; off her AOE/HP kit.

ranking.name: Azmodan
ranking.reason: On-being-hit chance to apply [Bleed] — a Bleed mirror; Gaia has no Bleed synergy and the chip is negligible vs her needs.

ranking.name: Sariel
ranking.reason: On-being-hit chance to apply [Infect] — Infect payload Gaia can't leverage; dead utility.

ranking.name: Bathory
ranking.reason: Effect Hit Rate — Gaia lands no debuffs/control, so improving her effect-hit does nothing.

ranking.name: Enchantress
ranking.reason: Effect Hit + [Fox Fire] debuff on attack — a control/effect-hit kit Gaia has no use for; her hits aren't built to land/scale debuffs.

ranking.name: Venus
ranking.reason: Support DMG-reduction mirror — damage-reduction is on-axis for a tank like Gaia, giving real durability value, though it's a small rare-tier effect outclassed by Frostglow/Garvin.
